title: Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic
content:

"'''Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic'''" is an 8-page reference article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]]. It was written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]], and features illustrations by [[Chris Trevas]].<ref name="SWI 84" />

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

{{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}}
